_comment: United Kingdom locale - NINO, Sort Code+Account, UTR, NHS
sitReference:
=== MANDATORY DATA FORMAT RULES (follow EXACTLY) ===

These patterns match Microsoft Purview Sensitive Information Type (SIT) detection rules.
Following them ensures HIGH CONFIDENCE (85%) detection in DLP policies and auto-labeling.

U.K. NATIONAL INSURANCE NUMBER (NINO):
- Format: 2 letters + 6 digits + 1 letter (e.g., AB 12 34 56 C)
- First 2 letters: NOT D, F, I, Q, U, V; second letter NOT O
- Last letter: A, B, C, or D only
- MUST include keyword: "national insurance", "NINO", "NI number", "insurance number"
- Examples: AB 12 34 56 C, QQ 12 34 56 A, JG 45 67 89 B
- Generate 3-8 different NINO values per document.

U.K. SORT CODE + BANK ACCOUNT:
- Sort Code: 6 digits (XX-XX-XX)
- Account: 8 digits
- Include keyword: "sort code", "account number", "bank account"
- Examples: Sort Code 20-00-00, Account 12345678

U.K. UNIQUE TAXPAYER REFERENCE (UTR):
- Format: 10 digits
- Include keyword: "UTR", "unique taxpayer reference", "tax reference"
- Examples: 1234567890

U.K. NHS NUMBER:
- Format: 10 digits (XXX XXX XXXX)
- Include keyword: "NHS", "NHS number", "health service number"
- Examples: 123 456 7890

U.K. PASSPORT NUMBER:
- Format: 9 digits
- Include keyword: "passport", "passport number"
- Examples: 123456789

PHONE: 07XXX XXXXXX (mobile) or 020 XXXX XXXX (London)
EMAIL: firstname.lastname@corplab.co.uk
NAMES: Use realistic British names

HR.Prompt: Generate a monthly payslip CSV: Employee;NI_Number;Sort_Code;Account_No;Gross_Pay;Tax;NI_Contrib;Net_Pay;Date. Include 6-10 rows. NI Number with keyword 'national insurance number' format AB 12 34 56 C.
Generate a confidential employee record with full name, NI number (national insurance number AB 12 34 56 C), sort code and bank account, annual salary in GBP, UK home address, start date.
Generate an onboarding checklist with NI number (national insurance number), sort code and account number for salary, manager name, equipment list.
Generate an HMRC Starter Checklist with employee name, NI number (national insurance number), date of birth, UK address, student loan status, previous employer details.

Generate a P60 End of Year Certificate CSV: Employee;NI_Number;Tax_Code;Total_Pay;Total_Tax;NI_Contributions;UTR. Include 8-12 rows. NI with keyword 'national insurance'. UTR with keyword 'unique taxpayer reference'.
Generate an annual appraisal document with employee name, NI number (national insurance number), objectives, salary discussion in GBP, bank details for bonus.
Generate a staff register CSV: Name;NI_Number;Start_Date;Title;Department;Salary;Sort_Code;Account. 8-12 rows.

Finance.Prompt: Generate a BACS supplier payment CSV: Supplier;Sort_Code;Account_No;Amount;Reference. Include 6-8 UK suppliers.
Generate a quarterly financial report with revenue, costs in GBP, treasury sort code and account, VAT registration number (GB + 9 digits).
Generate a P11D benefits in kind CSV: Employee;NI_Number;Benefit_Type;Cash_Value;Tax_Paid. Include 5-8 rows.
Generate an expense claim with employee name, reimbursement sort code and account, itemized expenses in GBP, total.
Generate a budget forecast with salary costs in GBP, treasury bank account, department breakdowns.
Generate an invoice with supplier details, sort code and account for payment, VAT registration (GB + 9 digits), line items, total excl/incl VAT in GBP.

Legal.Prompt: Generate an ICO compliance audit report listing 4-6 persons with their NI numbers (national insurance number), findings, corrective actions.
Generate a UK employment contract with employee NI number (national insurance number), sort code and account, salary in GBP, notice period, holiday entitlement.
Generate a UK GDPR processing register entry for payroll: data types (NI number, sort code, UTR), legal basis, retention period.
Generate a litigation file summary with claimant NI number (national insurance number), claimed amount in GBP, tribunal timeline.
Generate a legal opinion about UK data protection compliance referencing NI numbers (national insurance number) found in breach.
Generate an NDA with party names, UK addresses, confidential information description, penalty amounts in GBP.

Sales.Prompt: Generate a sales pipeline CSV: Client;Contact;Email;Sort_Code;Account;Contract_Amount. Include 5-8 UK prospects.
Generate a commercial proposal with client details, payment sort code and account, quote amount in GBP excl/incl VAT.
Generate a commission report CSV: Sales_Rep;Client;Revenue;Commission;Sort_Code;Account. 4-6 rows.
Generate client meeting notes with attendees, budget in GBP, next steps, bank details for advance payment.
Generate a prospect list with UK company names, contact person, email, phone 07XXX XXXXXX, estimated contract value in GBP.
Generate an RFP response with company credentials, pricing in GBP, bank details (sort code + account), references.
